titles: "ETF 사놓고 1년 방치했습니다" 계좌를 열어보니 충격적인 결과
ETF 리밸런싱, 1년에 한 번 안 하면 수익률이 이렇게 됩니다
"수익률의 91%는 이걸로 결정됩니다" ETF 방치하면 안 되는 진짜 이유

character_poses.1: REACT-04 깜짝 놀람 — 1년 방치 계좌 충격 리액션
character_poses.2: REACT-05 설명 중(교수 모드) — Before vs After 리밸런싱 비교
character_poses.3: INTRO-05 정면 응시 + 손짓 — 균형의 원리(저울) 안내

meta.design_rule: 상단 47% 이미지 + 하단 53% 순검정 (미리캔버스 노랑 2줄 텍스트 자리). 스컹크 벡터 스타일. 말풍선 라벨 자리는 이미지 상단 좌우 여백에 확보.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 1 — 스컹크 깜짝 놀람(REACT-04). 좌측 스컹크 양 볼 잡고 극도의 충격, 작은 임팩트 라인 사방으로. 우측에 먼지·거미줄 덮인 녹슨 ETF 계좌 카드, 그 뒤로 급락하는 빨간 캔들차트. 우상단 코너에 1년 경과를 알리는 빈티지 시계 아이콘과 빨간 느낌표 글로우. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, huge round eyes popping wide open in extreme shock, small pink nose, jaw dropped in disbelief, both paws pressed against the cheeks, small impact lines radiating outward. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk is positioned on the LEFT side of the upper frame, upper body shot. On the RIGHT side: a large dusty rusted ETF account card covered in spider webs and cobwebs, behind it a steeply downward-plunging red candlestick chart, a vintage analog clock in the upper-right corner indicating one year has passed, and a glowing red exclamation icon hovering above the chart. Faint dust motes drifting through the air. Background: deep navy blue gradient with subtle red warning glow particles and a faint financial grid pattern. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top corners for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Absolutely no text, no letters, no words, no numbers, no watermark anywhere in the image. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with strong red shock atmosphere.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 2 — 스컹크 교수 모드(REACT-05). 중앙 스컹크가 작은 안경 쓰고 검지 한 손가락 들어 'listen up' 제스처. 좌측 균열난 회색 불균형 원형차트(Before), 우측 빛나는 황금-에메랄드 균형 원형차트(After). 둘 사이를 황금 화살표가 좌→우로 가로지름. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes, small pink nose, calm professional expression wearing small round glasses, one finger raised in a 'listen up' teaching gesture. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk stands in the CENTER of the upper frame, half body shot. On the LEFT side: a cracked and faded pie chart with uneven segments in muted gray and dull red tones, with visible fractures and small dust particles floating around it, representing a neglected unbalanced portfolio. On the RIGHT side: a perfectly balanced pie chart glowing with radiant gold and emerald green light, with luminous edges and a subtle halo effect, representing a freshly rebalanced portfolio. A bold golden arrow runs from the left chart to the right chart, indicating transformation. Background: deep navy blue gradient with subtle financial grid pattern and soft sparkle particles around the right chart. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-left corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Absolutely no text, no letters, no words, no numbers, no readable chart labels anywhere in the image. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with clear before-after contrast.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 3 — 스컹크 정면 응시 + 안내 손짓(INTRO-05). 좌측 스컹크가 정면 보며 따뜻한 미소로 한 손 앞으로 안내. 우측에 거대한 황금 저울 — 한쪽 팬에 빛나는 ETF 골드바 더미, 다른 쪽 팬에 에메랄드 빛 다양한 자산 아이콘 바구니. 양쪽 완벽 균형. 황금 렌즈 플레어와 골드-네이비 색감. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes looking directly at the viewer with a warm confident smile, small pink nose. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk is positioned on the LEFT side of the upper frame, full body shot, one paw extended forward in a welcoming presenter gesture inviting the viewer. On the RIGHT side: an oversized ornate golden balance scale, perfectly balanced with both pans level — the LEFT pan holds a stack of gleaming gold bars radiating warm golden light, the RIGHT pan holds a glowing emerald-green basket filled with small diversified asset icons (miniature chart shapes, coin shapes, and bond shapes). Soft golden lens flare on the scale. Navy and gold accent color palette throughout. Background: deep navy blue gradient with golden bokeh sparkles and a faint radial glow behind the scale. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-right corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Absolutely no text, no letters, no words, no numbers, no readable labels on the bars or basket anywhere in the image. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with elegant gold and navy aesthetic.
